conflict: Bills, debt, and status upkeep force the couple to confront the private lies each has told in order to keep the household legible as stable.
consequence: Financial secrecy breaks the fragile alliance and makes freedom look like real class loss rather than a brave abstraction.
must_land_beats: Ben's debt must feel embarrassing in concrete terms rather than merely numerical.
Nita's borrowed money from her mother reveals her own private maintenance of the family facade.
The chapter should make clear that both spouses have been subsidizing the machine's version of them.
By the end, they remain aligned only because nobody else is coming to save them.
pressure_source: Bills, debt, and status upkeep force the couple to confront the private lies each has told in order to keep the household legible as stable.
state_shift: Financial secrecy breaks the fragile alliance and makes freedom look like real class loss rather than a brave abstraction.
